race.comment: The outside barrier poses a huge challenge for boom colt HOLLYWOOD STRIP (12) but he has looked the real deal in winning all seven starts to date. He beat most of tonight's main rivals with his resuming win at Listed level before proving too good for older rivals last time, both at this circuit and distance. He'll be peaking so counting on a masterful Brad Hewitt drive to get him home. ZEUS LIGHTNING NZ (5) is another hitting his best at the right time. Progressed off his fresh second to HOLLYWOOD STRIP for a strong heat win by close to 7m last week, both times coming from one spot wider than this. Expect him to push forward again and this maps to pan out well for him. SHOWMETHETANLINES NZ (1) took his record at this circuit and distance to three from five when winning his heat last week. He should get a soft run from the inside draw so could be dangerous. FIRE AND PASSION (2) and SOHO TRUMP (4) are both reliable colts who draw to be competitive so are worth including in exotics.
